notableEvents.label: Edwin Arroyo reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Edwin Arroyo reaches on a missed catch error by first baseman Ben Rice, assist to shortstop Anthony Volpe.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Amed Rosario reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Matt McLain.

notableEvents.label: Dane Myers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dane Myers doubles (5) on a fly ball to left fielder Cody Bellinger. Sal Stewart scores.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: José Caballero grounds into a force out, third baseman Sal Stewart to second baseman Edwin Arroyo. Cody Bellinger scores. Jasson Domínguez out at 2nd. José Caballero advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by second baseman Edwin Arroyo.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: José Caballero grounds into a force out, third baseman Sal Stewart to second baseman Edwin Arroyo. Cody Bellinger scores. Jasson Domínguez out at 2nd. José Caballero advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by second baseman Edwin Arroyo.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Edwin Arroyo reaches on a missed catch error by first baseman Ben Rice, assist to shortstop Anthony Volpe.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Jones pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Jones called out on strikes.
